Video.summary: Emeril and young chef CJ Calhoun make a meal any kid would love!
Video.title: Emeril and Guests CJ Calhoun, Dominique Taylor

Video.summary: Emeril and food critic Ian McNulty make classic New Orleans cuisine.
Video.title: Emeril and Guest Ian McNulty

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Scott Maurer compose an entire meal around Louisiana oysters.
Video.title: Emeril and Guest Scott Maurer

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Gabrielle Deculus celebrate creole culinary culture.
Video.title: Emeril and Guest Gabrielle Deculus

Video.summary: New England Patriots superfan Kim Mello join forces to create New England eats with a New Orleans twist.
Video.title: Boston

Video.summary: Emeril prepares dishes with saffron grown right in the southern United States.
Video.title: Saffron from the South

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Bau Nguyen draw inspiration from Vietnamese dishes.
Video.title: Emeril and Guest Bau Nguyen

Video.summary: Emeril and jazz legend Kermit Ruffins classic New Orleans cuisine.
Video.title: Emeril and Guest Kermit Ruffins

Video.summary: For your next tailgate, let Los Angeles' Asian flavors inspire you.
Video.title: Los Angeles Chargers

Video.summary: Emeril prepares a Tex-Mex menu to dazzle Houston Texan superfans.
Video.title: Houston Texans

Video.summary: After a visit to Louisiana's largest pecan farm, Emeril shares his favorite recipes.
Video.title: Pecan Paradise

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Janie Glade create an economical meal that makes use of pantry staples.
Video.title: Emeril and Guest Janie Glade

Video.summary: Emeril and dairy farm owner Sarah Roland create dishes using buffalo mozzarella.
Video.title: Emeril and Guest Sarah Roland

Video.summary: Emeril recreates some of his restaurant's best dishes with his son EJ Lagasse and Johnny Slamon.
Video.title: Emeril and Guests Johnny Slamon and EJ Lagasse

Emeril and Guests Johnny Slamon and EJ Lagasse
Emeril and Guests Johnny Slamon and EJ Lagasse

Video.summary: Emeril's friends Maggie Long and Cyrus Lester share a meal incorporating fresh mushrooms from their farm.
Video.title: Emeril and Guest Mushroom Maggie

Video.summary: Emeril and Buffalo Bills superfan Lindsey Kszos takes inspiration from her city's famous wings.
Video.title: Buffalo

Video.summary: We've all heard of soft shell crab, but did you know there's also soft shell shrimp?
Video.title: A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp

Image.alt: A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp
A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp
A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp

Video.summary: Emeril highlights Morning Glory, an invasive vegetable grown only by special permission.
Video.title: Illegal Greens: Morning Glory

Video.summary: Detroit Lions superfan Michael Banks and his wife, Rona, turn to grilled Tailgating fare.
Video.title: Detroit

Video.summary: Emeril whips up Cali-style carne asada burritos, crowd-pleasing chicken, and green chile nachos.
Video.title: Los Angeles Rams

Video.summary: Triumph at your next tailgate with Emeril's easy (and crowd-pleasing) crab dishes.
Video.title: Baltimore Ravens

Video.summary: Tennessee Titans superfans Isaiah Washington and Jameson Greer take Southern home cooking to new heights.
Video.title: Nashville

Video.summary: Emeril honors Wisconsin, the cheese capital of the US, with cheesy beer dips and soft pretzels.
Video.title: Green Bay

Video.summary: Emeril helps a 49ers superfan cook up some crowd-pleasing Bay Area seafood dishes.
Video.title: San Francisco

Video.summary: Emeril turns Kansas City's world-famous barbecue into tender ribs and bourbon-baked beans for the grill.
Video.title: Kansas City

Video.summary: For a New York-style tailgate, keep it old school with Emeril's favorite deli inspired classics.
Video.title: New York Giants

Video.summary: Emeril and Chef Shermond Esteen prepare dishes inspired by Shermond's brunch menu.
Video.title: Emeril and Guest Shermond Esteen

Video.summary: Emeril helps Chicago Bears fan Edgar Mejia put a New Orleans spin on hotdogs and deep dish pizza.
Video.title: Chicago

Video.summary: Emeril welcomes Pittsburgh Steelers superfan Brad Younkin; recipes inspired by Pittsburgh's Polish roots.
Video.title: Pittsburgh

Video.summary: At your next tailgate, go with a sure-fire southern menu of "meat and three."
Video.title: Tennessee Titans

Video.summary: For a Carolina-inspired tailgate, wow your guests with Emeril's take on some hometown faves.
Video.title: Carolina Panthers

Video.summary: Emeril meets Vikings fans Jim Dazzle and Brandie Pac from Minneapolis.
Video.title: Minneapolis

Video.summary: Dallas Cowboys superfan Jesse Prado, aka Big Brother, creates Tex-Mex barbecue with a Louisiana kick.
Video.title: Dallas

Video.summary: Emeril tailgates Vegas-style with a decadent Sin City-inspired menu.
Video.title: Las Vegas Raiders

Video.summary: Emeril prepares his favorite football menu. These are the dishes that Emeril serves to his family and friends!
Video.title: How Emeril Tailgates

Video.summary: For the next tailgate, take a cue from Emeril's home team the New Orleans Saints.
Video.title: New Orleans Saints

Video.summary: At the next home game, turn classic dinner dishes into a fancy tailgate meal.
Video.title: Jacksonville Jaguars

Video.summary: Dine like a Hoosier with chicken fried steak, barbecue chicken, and sugar cream pie.
Video.title: Indianapolis Colts

Video.summary: For a Texas-style tailgate, impress your guests with Emeril's take on the state's faves.
Video.title: Dallas Cowboys

Video.summary: Celebrate Cleveland's roots with a Polish-inspired tailgate menu.
Video.title: Cleveland Browns

Video.summary: Emeri's tailgate menu is inspirated by flavors (and favorite sandwiches) of Philadelphia.
Video.title: Philadelphia Eagles
